## Description
Brief description of changes.

## Type
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New tool / script
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist
- [ ] SKILL.md includes valid frontmatter (`name`, `description`, `compatibility`, `metadata.author`)
- [ ] Scripts include `--help` flag
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Follows responsible use policy (authorized targets only)
